channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Iran claims ‘strict control’ of Strait of Hormuz and says it will not be fully reopened
item.description: <![CDATA[Iran claims ‘strict control’ of Strait of Hormuz and says it will not be fully reopened]]>

item.title: Economic pain from Iran war will hit poor countries hardest, officials say

item.title: Big Tech’s giant headache: billions in AI capital spending and investors demanding quick results
item.description: <![CDATA[Big Tech’s giant headache: billions in AI capital spending and investors demanding quick results]]>

item.title: New York City is floating a $500 million second-home tax — and it would hurt industries that support thousands of jobs
item.description: <![CDATA[New York City is floating a $500 million second-home tax — and it would hurt industries that support thousands of jobs]]>

item.title: This ‘hidden’ price of oil is going to hit your electric bill next
item.description: <![CDATA[This ‘hidden’ price of oil is going to hit your electric bill next]]>
